original: You massage the band of red welts on your skin, hoping that feeling returns soon, knowing that you won’t be able to use your weapon until then. You are disarmed!
You manage to summon up the willpower to tear your eyes away from the hypnotic patterns.

You feel like you’ve only stared at the scintillating colors for a moment or two, but the touch of air on your exposed [pc.skinFurScales] startles you. In some sort of trance, you’ve disengaged your airtight protection, leaving vast swathes of your body vulnerable to the leyak’s attacks.
You duck under the flashing tendrils just in time. They whoosh harmlessly overhead.
The leyak’s tentacle slaps uselessly against your airtight equipment, leaving a smear of iridescent slime. You’re thankful that it can’t seem to make it through your gear.
You yelp in pain as a fiery sting burns into your flesh, jarringly followed by a worrying surge of numbness. You are poisoned!
The tentacle slaps against your flesh, leaving a smear of quick-drying slime. Your breath catches in your throat as you feel your body flush with arousal.
The tentacle seems to only graze you, leaving a strange stinging that travels up your body and to your mouth. You’re uninjured, but you can’t seem to stop drooling.
You dodge out of the way of the leyak as it swoops by. It curves back up into the air, and hovers, its three eyes fixated on you hungrily.

The leyak collides into you, its lips suckered against your skin. You wince in pain as it slurps off some of your biomass. Flailing to knock it loose, only sends it swooping back up into the air. It looks ready to drop down on you again for more!
You dodge out of the way of the leyak as it swoops by. It curves back up into the air, and hovers, its three eyes fixated on you hungrily.
The leyak’s lips suckle uselessly against your airtight equipment, leaving a smear of iridescent, venomous drool. You’re thankful that it can’t seem to make it through your gear.

The leyak’s kiss catches you full on the [pc.mouth], and before you can stop it, it’s slipped its tongues between your [pc.lipsChaste] and filled your mouth with curiously-sweet saliva. You swat the leyak back, but, before you can stop yourself, reflexively swallow the load of leyak spit. Your body immediately heats up, and you feel the leyak’s toxins rapidly raising your lust.\n\n(Aphro status gained!)
You manage to shield your eyes from the color-changing creature before it can blind you entirely.

You lurch backward, throwing your arm up in front of your eyes a moment too late. Dazzled, you see the nauseating afterimages of the chromatic conflagration. It’ll take a few moments for your vision to return, but until then, you are blinded!
You duck under the flashing tendrils just in time. They whoosh harmlessly overhead.
The leyak’s tentacle slaps uselessly against your airtight equipment, leaving a smear of iridescent slime. You’re thankful that it can’t seem to make it through your gear.

The tentacle slaps at your wrist, sending a surge of pain up through your arm. You hiss through your teeth, nearly dropping your [pc.weapon]. Heat lances out from the point of contact, running up all the way to your shoulder.
